title: Diyaarnimada Ka-baxa
ask_prompt: Dhibcahayga diyaarnimada ka-baxa waa {pct}/100 (Darajo {grade}). Daciifnimooyinka muhiimka ah: {weaknesses}. Dakhliga: {revenue}, Faa'iidada saafiga ah: {netMargin}%, Koritaanka: {growth}. Maxaan mudnaanta siiyaa si aan u noqdo diyaar-ka-bax 12 bilood gudahood?
headline_a: Cabbirrada ganacsigaagu way xoog badan yihiin. Waxaad iibsadayaasha ama dilaalada ku qaban kartaa kalsooni.
headline_b: Aasaaska badankiisu waa adag yihiin. Dhawr hagaajin oo la beegsaday ayaa diyaar-ka-bax kaa dhigi doona.
headline_c: Awooddu way jirtaa, laakiin dhawr meelood ayaa u baahan xoojin ka hor geeddi-socodka ka-baxa.
headline_d: Shaqo weyn ayaa loo baahan yahay dhinacyo badan ka hor inta aan ganacsigu soo jiidan iibsadayaasha.
factor_profitability_desc: Faa'iido saafi ah oo togan oo joogto ah waxay soo jiidataa kordhis sare
factor_growth_desc: Xarrigga koritaan joogto ah wuxuu kordhiyaa kalsoonida iibsadaha
factor_margins_desc: Faa'iido sare waxay tilmaamaan awood qiime iyo ballaarin karti
factor_predictability_desc: Kala-duwanaansho hooseeya oo dakhliga bishii ah waxay yareysaa khatarta iibsadaha
factor_runway_desc: Muddo lacag oo xooggan = cadaadis iib naxdin ma jiro
factor_data_quality_desc: Xisaabaad nadiif ah waxay dedejiyaan baaritaanka
factor_diversification_desc: Marinno/badeecooyin badan waxay yareeyaan khatarta ku-xoojinta hal meel
action_profitability: Jar badeecooyinka daciifka ah, dib u xaajood shuruudaha alaab-qeybiyaha, kor u qaad qiimaha alaabta baahida sare leh
action_growth: Kala-duw marinnada, ku maalgeli suuqgeynta, soo dhaji badeecooyin cusub, gal suuqyo cusub
action_margins: La xaajood qiime alaab-qeybiye oo ka wanaagsan, yaree khasaaraha, u wareeji isku-dhaf badeeco oo faa'iido sare leh
action_predictability: Dhis dakhli rukumid/soo-noqnoqda ah, xaqiiji heshiisyo muddo-dheer ah, siman god xilliyeed
action_runway: Dhis kayd lacag, si dhakhso ah u ururi la-sugayaasha, yaree kharashka aan lagama-maarmaan ahayn
action_data_quality: Ku xiro dhammaan marinnada iibka, hay diiwaanno joogto ah, dijitaali ka dhig rasiidada
action_diversification: Ku dar marinno onlayn/offlayn ah, ballaari qaybaha badeecada, yaree ku-tiirsanaanta hal macmiil
